channel.title: Install Mullvad GUI on Kicksecure VM on KVM
channel.description:
Hey! I have been trying to install Mullvad vpn on my Kicksecure VM for a while but I dont know how to get It to work! I managed to install the gui and mullvad pops upp but It only says “Connecting to mullvad system service “unable to contact the mullvad system service”
Anyone know what Im doing wrong? Thanks!!:)
![|690x288](upload://dckOPqZSvc4dCLm7CK9XvAYF5OX.jpeg)

item.title: Install Mullvad GUI on Kicksecure VM on KVM
item.dc:creator: init38
item.description:
Also take a look at this

Mullvad VPN only working with UDP-over-TCP on Kicksecure 17/18

Read full topic
item.source: Install Mullvad GUI on Kicksecure VM on KVM

item.title: Install Mullvad GUI on Kicksecure VM on KVM
item.dc:creator: init38
item.description:
Haseeb Majid – 21 Oct 23

TIL: How to Fix Networking Issues in a Libvirt VM and Mullvad VPN | Haseeb Majid

TIL: How to Fix Networking Issues in a Libvirt VM and Mullvad VPN Recently, I was trying to run a libvirt virtual machine, created using virt-manager. The VM was running NixOS and somehow no matter what I did it would not connect to the internet. I...

https://discussion.fedoraproject.org/t/qemu-kvm-vm-loses-network-access-when-local-network-sharing-is-disabled-in-mullvad-vpn/146579

See if enabling this in mullvad settings works.

If that is not it then I would look at look at what the NAT setting is in “Virtual Networks” tab next to Storage where you install the VM’s. If the VM network interface is configured as macvtap or bridge, the traffic won’t go through the host OS VPN. The default NAT setting should be fine in KVM, unless you changed it.

Additionally I want to preface that I believe enabling local network sharing to be safe. Unless if you feel its not, it would require a setup of more complexity that I don’t know much about.

See if this fixes the issue.

Read full topic
item.source: Install Mullvad GUI on Kicksecure VM on KVM

item.title: Install Mullvad GUI on Kicksecure VM on KVM
item.dc:creator: whistleblow
item.description:
Hey! I have been trying to install Mullvad vpn on my Kicksecure VM for a while but I dont know how to get It to work! I managed to install the gui and mullvad pops upp but It only says “Connecting to mullvad system service “unable to contact the mullvad system service”

Anyone know what Im doing wrong? Thanks!!

Read full topic
item.source: Install Mullvad GUI on Kicksecure VM on KVM
